CE1.justification: Acted: corrected draft is already staged with real trade-offs enumerated; user just confirms or redirects without recalling or rereading anything.

CE2.justification: Terse paragraph — error, location of corrected draft with trade-offs in parens, ask, and one-line routing note. No padding.

CE3.justification: Names every routed artifact with a short why: corrected draft staged in tmp (not decisions.md), hold logged in daybook, followup tracking the wait.

CE4.justification: Mostly clean, but tmp/adr-draft-corrected.md is an in-progress artifact alongside the untouched original — a future session would have to reconcile two drafts if the user never returns.
